title: CardResult / Gate verdict
description: Structured completion result a worker writes to a kanban card; the plugin parses it into a domain Outcome. Gate cards carry the goal-gate verdict (research D4).

status.description: Node-level status mapped to the domain NodeStatus.

preferred_label.description: Routing hint: preferred outgoing edge label (FR-007).

suggested_next.description: Routing hint: suggested next node ids (FR-007).

context_updates.description: Context key/value updates applied before traversal continues (FR-008). JSON-serializable values only.

required_changes.description: Corrections fed into the next iteration card on gate fail.
